data.title: Giving money to poor families at specific times lowered young children death rates by almost 50%, reveals a recent study.
data.description: A recent study discovered that providing financial assistance to impoverished families during specific periods resulted in a nearly 50% decrease in deaths among young children. The research emphasized the significant impact of monetary support on reducing mortality rates in this vulnerable demographic.

data.title: Bitcoin has outperformed S&P500, Nasdaq, gold, real estate, and 10-year Treasury bonds over the past decade. Bitcoin's 46% real return surpasses its competitors.
data.description: Over the past decade, Bitcoin has shown superior performance compared to other asset classes, despite its notable volatility. In a recent analysis, macro investor Krueger compared the nominal and inflation-adjusted returns of Bitcoin between 2014 and 2024 with those of the S&P 500, Nasdaq, gold, U.S. real estate, and 10-year Treasury bonds. When factoring in 7% "true" inflation and a 20% capital gains tax, Bitcoin exhibited a substantial 46% real return, far surpassing its competitors like Nasdaq with +4% and S&P. This information was shared in a post on X on Sep. 1. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: T-Mobile projects $1.2 billion in cost synergies, shortening integration timeline to 2 years after UScellular acquisition.
data.description: T-Mobile US Inc. (NASDAQ: TMUS) has revised its guidance following the completion of acquiring UScellular. The company has raised its cost-savings target to $1.2 billion annually from the initial forecast of $1 billion. The integration timeline has been shortened to two years from the previous estimate of three to four years. COO Srini Gopalan stated that the merger would improve service for subscribers of both companies. T-Mobile anticipates operational expense reductions of $950 million and capital expense efficiencies of $250 million. The integration is expected to incur certain costs.

data.title: EnergyHub strengthens EV managed charging leadership by buying BTR, enhancing partnerships with top EV OEMs.
data.description: In New York, EnergyHub, a prominent grid-edge flexibility solutions provider, recently revealed the acquisition of Bridge to Renewables (BTR). Through this strategic investment, EnergyHub aims to boost the growth of utility electric vehicle (EV) programs. This move expands EnergyHub's partnerships with leading EV original equipment manufacturers, offers access to essential integrations with these manufacturers, and facilitates enhanced EV driver experiences during managed charging. The acquisition is set to significantly enhance EnergyHub's position in the EV market and drive further growth in this sector.

data.title: FTX Token (FTT) struggles at $0.76 support as price hits $0.79. Bearish indicators and key levels signal concern.
data.description: The price of FTT is currently sitting at $0.79 and is showing bearish momentum indicators, with key support levels being tested. Technical analysis is signaling potential concerns for FTT as the price remains under pressure.

data.title: GoldenPeaks Capital opens flagship solar plant in Hungary, Zemplén Solar Park, celebrating with business and political reps.
data.description: In Budapest, Hungary, GoldenPeaks Capital (GPC), a rapidly expanding independent green energy producer in Europe, recently marked the inauguration of its major photovoltaic venture in Bodroghalom - the Zemplén Solar Park. Fabian Gaus, CEO of GoldenPeaks Capital, extended a warm welcome to Hungarian business and political figures at the event. This initiative signifies a significant advancement in Hungary's renewable energy expansion and serves as a noteworthy achievement for the company.

data.title: Leandro Abreu named COO of Convergent Energy and Power, effective Sept 1. Over 20 years experience in energy and technology.
data.description: New York - Convergent Energy and Power (Convergent), a prominent energy storage solutions provider in North America, has named Leandro Abreu as the Chief Operating Officer, starting from September 1. Abreu, with over twenty years of experience in managing intricate organizations and fostering top-tier teams, has been recognized for his operational expertise in various sectors such as renewable energy and technology. This move signifies a strategic development for Convergent, reinforcing their commitment to effective leadership and operational proficiency.

data.title: Roblox's Economic Impact Report, with reports for multiple countries, showcases global contribution and creator empowerment.
data.description: In San Mateo, California, Roblox Corporation (NYSE: RBLX) revealed the launch of its latest annual U.S. Roblox Economic Impact Report. This release also included reports covering the United Kingdom, Brazil, the Middle East, and Australia. These reports highlight the platform's substantial economic impact globally. They emphasize how Roblox spurs a vibrant economic environment for developers, creators, and businesses, facilitating connections.

data.title: 1Money obtains 34 US money transmitter licenses and a Bermuda Class F digital asset license to offer stablecoin services.
data.description: 1Money has successfully obtained 34 money transmitter licenses in the United States, in addition to securing a Bermuda Class F digital asset license. This milestone allows 1Money to introduce stablecoin orchestration services, showcasing its commitment to compliance and innovation in the digital asset space.

data.title: Louisiana Brand Hot Sauce partners with Jalen Hurts Foundation to cool Philadelphia schools.
data.description: In Rome, Georgia, The Original Louisiana Brand Hot Sauce™ has partnered with The Jalen Hurts Foundation to support in keeping schools at a comfortable temperature.
